title: Kyiv: Missile attack on infrastructure
title_en: Kyiv: Missile attack on infrastructure

description: Russia's mass missile attacks on Ukraine 'must continue,' Putin says. "I note that massive, coordinated strikes against the infrastructure of Ukraine's military-industrial complex and the facilities supporting its operation must continue," Russian President Vladimir Putin said.
description_en: Russia's mass missile attacks on Ukraine 'must continue,' Putin says. "I note that massive, coordinated strikes against the infrastructure of Ukraine's military-industrial complex and the facilities supporting its operation must continue," Russian President Vladimir Putin said.

title: Kharkiv: Casualties reported
title_en: Kharkiv: Casualties reported
title_uk: Харків: повідомляється про постраждалих
description: Liquidation of the consequences of the Russian airstrike continues in Sumy. The Russians used guided aerial bombs just against ordinary people in the center of the city. There may still be people under the rubble of a high-rise building. Unfortunately, as of now, it is known about four dead, among them - a child. My condolences to family and friends. Another 27 people were injured, six of whom were children. Many have serious injuries. During the day...
description_en: Liquidation of the consequences of the Russian airstrike continues in Sumy. The Russians used guided aerial bombs just against ordinary people in the center of the city. There may still be people under the rubble of a high-rise building. Unfortunately, as of now, it is known about four dead, among them - a child. My condolences to family and friends. Another 27 people were injured, six of whom were children. Many have serious injuries. During the day...
description_uk: У Сумах триває ліквідація наслідків російського авіаудару. Росіяни застосували керовані авіабомби просто проти звичайних людей у центрі міста. Під завалами багатоповерхівки ще можуть бути люди. На жаль, станом на зараз відомо про чотирьох загиблих, серед них – дитина. Мої співчуття рідним і близьким. Ще 27 людей зазнали поранень, з яких шестеро – діти. У багатьох – важкі поранення. Упродовж дня...

description: Major Russian oil refinery suspends operations again after Ukrainian drone strike. The Lukoil-Nizhegorodorgsintez plant is the fourth-largest oil refinery in Russia, second-largest producer of gasoline, and Lukoil's largest refinery.
description_en: Major Russian oil refinery suspends operations again after Ukrainian drone strike. The Lukoil-Nizhegorodorgsintez plant is the fourth-largest oil refinery in Russia, second-largest producer of gasoline, and Lukoil's largest refinery.

title: Drone attack
title_en: Drone attack
title_uk: Атака безпілотників
description: Attacks on refineries cost the Russian budget more than 1 trillion rubles ($13 billion) in just three months. From April to June, the state paid oil companies a record 1.03 trillion rubles in subsidies against the background of the shutdown of oil refineries after UAV attacks. As a result, oil and gas revenues of the federal budget fell by 23% in the first half of the year, to the lowest level since 2020, data show...
description_en: Attacks on refineries cost the Russian budget more than 1 trillion rubles ($13 billion) in just three months. From April to June, the state paid oil companies a record 1.03 trillion rubles in subsidies against the background of the shutdown of oil refineries after UAV attacks. As a result, oil and gas revenues of the federal budget fell by 23% in the first half of the year, to the lowest level since 2020, data show...
description_uk: Удары по НПЗ обошлись бюджету России более чем в 1 трлн рублей ($13 млрд) всего за за три месяца С апреля по июнь государство выплатило нефтяным компаниям рекордные 1,03 трлн рублей субсидий на фоне остановок нефтеперерабатывающих заводов после атак БПЛА. В результате нефтегазовые доходы федерального бюджета за первое полугодие обвалились на 23%, до минимума с 2020 года, свидетельствуют данные...

title: Donetsk: A very sincere conversation with Oleg Lyashko - the commander of the...
title_en: Donetsk: A very sincere conversation with Oleg Lyashko - the commander of the...
title_uk: Донецьк: Дуже щира розмова з командиром Олегом Ляшком...
description: A very sincere conversation with Oleg Lyashko - the commander of the 432nd separate regiment of unmanned systems of the 11th Army Corps. The unit protects our Donetsk region, and it is important to hear what requests of the army are the most important now and what political steps of the state can add motivation to our military. Unity matters, and there should be no reason to fragment our society. Thank you! Glory to Ukraine!
description_en: A very sincere conversation with Oleg Lyashko - the commander of the 432nd separate regiment of unmanned systems of the 11th Army Corps. The unit protects our Donetsk region, and it is important to hear what requests of the army are the most important now and what political steps of the state can add motivation to our military. Unity matters, and there should be no reason to fragment our society. Thank you! Glory to Ukraine!
description_uk: Дуже щира розмова з Олегом Ляшком – із командиром 432-го окремого полку безпілотних систем 11-го армійського корпусу. Підрозділ захищає нашу Донецьку область, і важливо почути, які запити армії найбільш вагомі зараз та які політичні кроки держави можуть додати мотивації нашим військовим. Єдність має значення, і не повинно бути приводів для розпорошення нашого суспільства. Дякую! Слава Україні!

title: Crimea: Drone strike
title_en: Crimea: Drone strike
title_uk: Крим: удар безпілотника
description: Ukraine strikes Russia's Saky air base in occupied Crimea for second time in a week, SBU says. According to the SBU, Ukrainian drones struck seven hangars at the Saky air base where Russia stores Su-30SM, Su-30, and Su-24 fighter and bomber aircraft.
description_en: Ukraine strikes Russia's Saky air base in occupied Crimea for second time in a week, SBU says. According to the SBU, Ukrainian drones struck seven hangars at the Saky air base where Russia stores Su-30SM, Su-30, and Su-24 fighter and bomber aircraft.

description: A bridge, a radio-electronic intelligence unit in Sevastopol and other enemy facilities were hit. On the night of July 3, as part of reducing the offensive potential of the Russian aggressor, units of the Defense Forces of Ukraine hit a railway bridge across the Krasnogvardiysky channel in the Krasnogvardiyskyi district of the Autonomous Republic of Crimea. The facility is used by the enemy for military logistics, transfer of personnel,...

The facility is used by the enemy for military logistics, transfer of personnel,...
description_uk: Уражено міст, підрозділ радіоелектронної розвідки у Севастополі та інші об’єкти ворога В ніч на 3 липня в рамках зниження наступального потенціалу російського агресора підрозділи Сил оборони України уразили залізничний міст через Красногвардійський канал у районі Красногвардійського на ТОТ АР Крим. Об'єкт використовується противником для військової логістики, перекидання особового складу,...

While much attention has focused on microchips entering Russia through intermediary countries, our investigation found another critical piece of the puzzle: European industrial machinery. Customs records obtained by the Kyiv Independent reveal that specialized metalworking equipment manufactured in...

title: Strike confirmed
title_en: Strike confirmed
title_uk: Страйк підтверджено
description: The enemy began to use new tactics: one of the "innovations" is the mass use of reactive UAVs. Probably, this is the first time when they were used in such a quantity, notes the monitoring public eRadar. Reactive UAVs are almost cruise missiles in speed, up to 600 km/h, which makes them difficult targets for small arms and mobile air defense fire groups. On the video - the moment of impact as...
description_en: The enemy began to use new tactics: one of the "innovations" is the mass use of reactive UAVs. Probably, this is the first time when they were used in such a quantity, notes the monitoring public eRadar. Reactive UAVs are almost cruise missiles in speed, up to 600 km/h, which makes them difficult targets for small arms and mobile air defense fire groups. On the video - the moment of impact as...
description_uk: Враг начал применять новую тактику: одним из "нововведений" является массовое использование реактивных БПЛА Вероятно, это первый случай, когда их задействовали в таком количестве, отмечает мониторинговый паблик єРадар. Реактивные БПЛА - по скорости почти крылатая ракета, до 600 км/ч, что делает их сложными целями для стрелкового оружия и мобильных огневых групп ПВО. На видео - момент удара как...

title: Kyiv: Airstrike attack on residential area
title_en: Kyiv: Airstrike attack on residential area
title_uk: Київ: авіаудар по житловому кварталу
description: Kyiv air quality plunges after Russia's biggest attack on capital of entire war. The smell of smoke and haze lingered over the capital. Authorities urge residents to keep windows closed, limit time outdoors, drink plenty of water, and use air purifiers if available.
